tasks.title: Scope and workspace setup
tasks.summary: Confirmed research goal, read required skills, and set the researcher workspace contract.

tasks.title: Evidence collection
tasks.summary: Collected representative sources across product semantics, systems architecture, and AI/agent workflows.

tasks.title: Summarization and topic indexing
tasks.summary: Wrote source cards, reusable summaries, topic index, and local implementation-plan artifacts under the researcher topic.

tasks.title: Gap analysis
tasks.summary: Compared Bilink against the research corpus and identified optimization opportunities centered on canonical edges, controlled rename, durable watch state, and agent-native extensions.

tasks.title: Next implementation plan
tasks.summary: Produced the recommended implementation sequence: OpenSpec change, canonical edge model, refs/check upgrade, two-phase rename, real watch, then agent-native extension layer.
